# kSecPolicyAppleCodeSigning

**Global Variable**

Policy for use in evaluating Apple code signing certificates.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPolicyAppleCodeSigning: CFString
```

## Discussion

To learn more about code signing certificates, read [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/IDEs/Conceptual/AppDistributionGuide/Introduction/Introduction.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40012582].
